byKRCG 13 Web Staff

KRCG 13 says farewell toChief Meteorologist Zach Paulas we mark his last day as a mid-Missouri meteorologist.

KRCG





After 21 years with the station, Zach will start work with the Special Olympics Missouri as their Director of Marketing and Communications.

He went live all day from the Jefferson City Culvers and has been met with vast amounts of love and support from our KRCG 13 viewers.

KRCG 13 says thank you and farewell to Chief Meteorologist Zach Paul on his last day on Wednesday, June 26, 2024. Zach will be live at the Culvers in Jefferson City to say goodbye to KRCG 13 viewers and give one last live weather forecast. (Photo - KRCG 13 Shea Baechle)

We're sad to see him go, but confident that Zach will do amazing work with a great organization.

Thank you, Zach, for all your hard work and years of service. You will always be an honorary member of the KRCG 13 family!

2025Sinclair, Inc.
title: Goodbye, Zach Paul!
description: KRCG 13 says farewell to Chief Meteorologist Zach Paul as we mark his last day as a mid-Missouri meteorologist.
